evals.prompt: Generate a polished standalone HTML document from this technical summary so I can export it as a PDF for a client.
evals.expected_output: A single-file HTML document with editorial CSS (no Tailwind), document type breadcrumb, TL;DR block, clear narrative flow, table of contents, print/PDF styles with @page and break-inside rules, responsive layout, and no decorative elements.

evals.prompt: Refine this architecture report HTML. Add flow diagrams, decision explainers, better evidence sections, and make it print cleanly.
evals.expected_output: An improved HTML document with hand-built SVG diagrams for complex flows, tabbed code snippets, decision sections with badges, evidence provenance section, click-to-reveal detail panels, and A4-friendly print styles.

evals.prompt: Convert this markdown implementation plan into a high-quality HTML document with interactive sections explaining why each decision was made.
evals.expected_output: A single-file HTML document with stat summary cards, timeline/milestone visualization, inline mockups, tabbed snippets, accordion decisions with tradeoffs, and keyboard-accessible interactions that degrade cleanly for print.
